description: Install dependencies and verify baseline build succeeds before making changes.
steps: Run 'npm install' in /projects/sandbox/Clear-mind to install all dependencies.
Run 'npm run build' to confirm the project compiles successfully with no errors.
acceptance_criteria: 'npm run build' completes with exit code 0
verification: Run 'npm run build' and confirm it exits successfully
findings: npm install completed successfully (349 packages, 2 non-blocking vulnerabilities). npm run build completed with exit code 0, producing dist/ output in 3.4s. Build warns about chunk size (847KB) but this is not a blocker.
